subject: Fix: Update link to upper-constraints.txt
commit_message:
Fix: Update link to upper-constraints.txt

Also, removed:
https://releases.openstack.org/constraints/upper/yoga
...from all three [testenv:*] sections in docs/tox.ini

Issue-ID: DOC-823

Change-Id: Ifb1603a72137d83d6f2ded77d0a2337001e72a66
Signed-off-by: thmsdt <thomas.kulik@telekom.de>
